qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: #include<stdio.h> void fun1(char* s1, char* s2){ char* temp; temp = s1; s1 = s2; s2 = temp; } void fun2(char** s1, char** s2){ char* temp; temp = *s1; *s1 = *s2; *s2 = temp; }
